name: delphi-stories-llama2-50k
license_evidence: HF cardData.license=apache-2.0 + tag license:apache-2.0. HF-metadata-only (no LICENSE file).
arch: LlamaForCausalLM hidden=6 layers=1 heads=3 vocab=4096 UNTIED (lm_head separate)
quant: int4 group-wise (g=64), NOT tied (lm_head quantized separately)
runtime: karpathy llama2.c / HF; uses tokenizer.json (HF fast, 154KB) not SentencePiece
notes: forward_ok=true, tie=false (config tie_word_embeddings=False, lm_head!=embed). 77KB on tape. tokenizer.json IS in bundle (verified). Leaderboard est ~178KB -> we beat it (49.5K params, tokenizer.json compresses well).
